# Project Overview

This is the introduction paragraph. It explains the project purpose and goals.
Not every line of text is a heading; this paragraph should be ignored by the parser.

## Installation

Steps to install the project on your system.

### Requirements

- Lua 5.1+
- Neovim 0.9+
- git

### Platform Notes

Additional notes for specific operating systems.

## Usage

How to use the project day-to-day.

# Advanced Topics

Advanced content for power users.

Underline Level One
===================

Content beneath a setext (underline-style) level-one heading.
The parser must detect this style and record it as level 1.

Underline Level Two
-------------------

Content beneath a setext level-two heading.
The adornment line must not be misread as the title of a subsequent heading.

## Mixed Hash Section

A regular hash-style level-two heading following the setext section.
This verifies that both styles can coexist in one document.

###### Deep Heading

A level-six heading to exercise the maximum depth the parser supports.
